given: The stock table exists with inventory_code column and rows
then: batch_number and serial_number columns are added to the stock table
architectural_notes: Infra: a contract on the stock data-store shape (the Alembic up migration adds batch_number/serial_number columns), proven by a parent-aware schema diff against the paired Lakebase branch, not an HTTP boundary. Owner: stock models module (app/models/stock.py) declares the new columns; the Alembic revision realizes them, applied via the repository/migration path that alone touches the ORM/session. Cross-cutting concern: schema evolution / data integrity (R1), owned at the repository/migration layer, never the domain or boundary.
